items.name: Frog head (Realistic)
items.description:
The red eyes of the Red-Eyed Tree Frog is a defence mechanism. When They close their eyes its all green. It blends in with all the plants.

When a animal wants to attack the frog. It opens its eyes. The red color pops out. This is scary for other animals for a second.

Please take a look at my UGC items <3 https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=11&Subcategory=19&CreatorID=35153
